subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch top 5 publishers by spend in Q4 2024 (October-December 2024), ordered by total spend descending

Reconcile Q4 2024 spend data with publisher performance metrics and contract terms to classify which of the top 5 publishers are at-risk (e.g., spending declining, contract renewal issues, SLA violations, vendor health concerns) and generate risk summary for SAM team

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (small tier) for a straightforward single-aggregate query filtering Q4 2024 and ranking by spend—no complex CTEs or window functions needed; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile the spend results with publisher health signals (contract data, performance metrics, renewal status) and generate risk classification. This tier avoids frontier-level inference but supports multi-signal assessment needed for SAM-focused risk summary. The plan does not include policy_action because risk assessment is part of reconciliation logic, not policy compliance evaluation. Minimal decomposition: both SQL generation and risk synthesis are necessary and cannot be combined into a single call.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as total_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5
